name: @chankov/agent-fleet
description: Multi-agent fleet orchestration for coding agents. Pi as the primary runtime, Herdr as the workspace control plane, coms as the peer data plane, and Hermes for remote control — plus skills, personas, harnesses, and a guided setup CLI.
author: Nikolay Chankov

scripts.test: node bin/cli.js --version && node bin/cli.js --help && node bin/cli.js transform-persona --list --agent claude-code && node --test "bin/test/*.test.js" "scripts/agent-hub-helpers.test.mjs" "scripts/agent-hub-spawn.test.mjs" "scripts/agent-hub-delegate.test.mjs" "scripts/agent-hub-research.test.mjs" ".pi/harnesses/lib/herdr-client.test.ts" ".pi/harnesses/lib/herdr-presence.test.ts" "scripts/coms-cli.test.ts" "scripts/lib/codex-conductor.test.ts" "scripts/lib/codex-remote-control.test.ts" "scripts/lib/team-project.test.ts" "scripts/lib/herdr-layout.test.ts" "scripts/lib/spawn-stagger.test.ts" "scripts/lib/fleet-extras.test.ts" "scripts/lib/team-snapshot.test.ts" "scripts/lib/coms-envelope.test.ts" "scripts/lib/claude-bridge-core.test.ts" "scripts/lib/hermes-bridge-core.test.ts" "scripts/coms-hermes-bridge.test.ts" ".pi/harnesses/ask-user-remote/race-core.test.js" ".pi/harnesses/ask-user-remote/index.test.ts" ".pi/extensions/btw/state.test.js" ".pi/harnesses/agent-hub/footer.test.ts" ".pi/harnesses/agent-hub/run-budget.test.js" ".pi/harnesses/agent-hub/drift-watchdog.test.js" ".pi/harnesses/agent-hub/return-contract.test.js" ".pi/harnesses/agent-hub/backend-policy.test.js" ".pi/harnesses/agent-hub/artifacts.test.js" ".pi/harnesses/agent-hub/scope-gate.test.js" ".pi/harnesses/agent-hub/evidence-rules.test.js" ".pi/harnesses/agent-hub/research-retention.test.js" ".pi/harnesses/damage-control/shared.test.js" ".pi/harnesses/damage-control/herdr-rules.test.js" ".pi/harnesses/damage-control-continue/exemptions.test.js"
scripts.version:changeset: node bin/force-patch-changesets.js && changeset version && node bin/sync-harness-versions.js && npm install --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts --no-audit --no-fund && node bin/snapshot-version.js
